events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate described field condition. Scenario: field review of grounding electrode system shows expected unit in intended location, nameplates/orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work no damage, matches referenced detail for rough-complete stage. Reference NEC 250.50-250.68. Need identify component/material/condition involved. The task: identify component, material, or condition. The described condition is acceptable, no defects. So decision pass, risk low, work_stage rough-complete, component_conditions empty, percent_complete maybe 80? rough-complete. value 0. confidence high. findings empty. actions empty. rationale: unit installed per detail, no damage, nameplates legible, orientation correct, complies with NEC grounding electrode system requirements. references NEC 250.50-250.68. Need include all fields. sound_source empty? Schema says string. Use "". event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order [], workable []. value 0. percent_complete maybe 85. confidence 0.95. Ensure valid JSON.
